default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Ayala from Crane Venture Partners and Marcel from fwd.digital to discuss potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company fwd.digital uses AI workflows to assist companies with content creation, marketing, sales, and other processes](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Ayala is interested in exploring how fwd.digital could help Crane's portfolio companies optimize their marketing and go-to-market efforts](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [They discussed setting up a session for Crane's marketing community, as well as a potential webinar for the broader portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

## Topics

### Background on Marcel and fwd.digital

  - [Previously at ScaleAI, then started building AI workflows for content creation which grew into fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Now at almost $1M ARR, with customers like Ramp and Bread, providing AI-assisted content creation and training on building AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Sees opportunity to help companies rethink how they approach work using AI assistants](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

### Ayala's role at Crane Venture Partners

  - [Focuses on go-to-market advisory for Crane's portfolio companies, many of which are technical founders needing sales/marketing guidance](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Runs communities for marketing, sales, product, etc. across the portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Private session for Crane's marketing community to learn about fwd.digital's AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Potential webinar for broader portfolio on topics like building a content engine for pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel to coordinate](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Ayala and his EA to a Slack channel to continue coordinating](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Aim for a session with Crane's marketing community on November 12th](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Explore doing a webinar for the full portfolio before then](https://fathom.video/share/VS1tvje8kxTvGthxBQy9xJcfY6JqGLfi?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

action_items.description: Schedule marketing team session for November 12th
Brainstorm potential formats for portfolio-wide webinar or session
Send call notes and recording to Ayala Ples
